scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run electron:compile && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:publish: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --publish always
